pages.text: Standard humanoid. No innate traits, no drawbacks. Picks one variant boon at world entry.$(br2)Height: 1.8$(br)Width: 0.6$(br2)$(bold)Tough.$() Maximum health 24 (12 hearts).$(br2)$(bold)Quick.$() Movement speed +5%.$(br2)$(bold)Far-Reaching.$() Interaction reach and attack range +1 block.$(br2)$(bold)Hardy.$() Immune to the Hunger effect.$(br2)$(bold)Sure-Footed.$() Fall damage reduced 60%.$(br2)$(bold)Strong Arm.$() Melee damage +1.$(br2)$(bold)Steady Aim.$() Bow and crossbow damage +15%.
